title: populus alba subsp. nivea
intro: Populus alba subsp. nivea, also known as Silver Poplar, is a subspecies of deciduous tree native to Europe and Asia. This tree is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of salicin, a compound similar to aspirin, which makes it useful in treating pain, inflammation, and fever. The health benefits of Populus alba subsp. nivea include its ability to reduce swelling, act as an antioxidant, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of Populus alba subsp. nivea include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from colds and flu to arthritis and skin conditions.
